name: rpa-import-node
description: RPA — import declaration data into DCTK (Node.js + Playwright port of rpa_import.py)

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/data && cp -f src/data/field-catalog.json dist/data/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('npx playwright install chromium',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.log('[postinstall] ข้าม playwright install (เว็บไม่ต้องใช้ chromium — worker ลงเองผ่าน build command)')}"
